data_type: Camera Video Feed / QR Code / Barcode Content
description: AVFoundation rear camera activated for barcode scanning via AVCaptureMetadataOutput. Camera preview displayed as CIImage stream. Detected barcode value returned to frontend.

flow_steps.code: func start() async { guard authorized else { return }; sessionQueue.async { self.captureSession.startRunning() } }
flow_steps.details: User triggers barcode scan; AVCaptureSession starts on session queue.

flow_steps.code: private func configureCaptureSession(completionHandler:) { let deviceInput = try? AVCaptureDeviceInput(device: captureDevice); captureSession.addInput(deviceInput) }
flow_steps.details: Rear camera device activated via AVCaptureDeviceInput. Supports triple, dual, and wide-angle cameras.

flow_steps.code: func captureOutput(_:, didOutput sampleBuffer:, from:) { addToPreviewStream?(CIImage(cvPixelBuffer: pixelBuffer)) }
flow_steps.details: Live camera preview frames streamed as CIImage for display. Video data output continuously produces pixel buffers.

flow_steps.code: func metadataOutput(_:, didOutput metadataObjects:, from:) { delegate?.didDetectBarcode(stringValue, format: format) }
flow_steps.details: AVCaptureMetadataOutput detects barcodes (QR, Aztec, Code128, Code39, Code93, DataMatrix, EAN13, EAN8, PDF417, UPC-E, Codabar, ITF14).
Detected barcode value returned to frontend for processing (e.g., triggering automation).
